name: GraphiteUI Skill Builder
description: 构建、校验、测试和修订 GraphiteUI 用户自定义 Skill 包。只写入 backend/data/skills/user，官方 Skill 只读，适合被创建 Skill 的图模板调用。
agentInstruction: 你已绑定 GraphiteUI Skill Builder。它只负责确定性的 Skill 包操作：检查现有 Skill、校验 skill.json/SKILL.md/run.py、写入用户 Skill 目录、运行 smoke test、创建修订和回滚。不要让它替代需求澄清或方案设计；这些应由 Agent 节点完成。生成或修复 Skill 时，files 必须是完整的相对路径到 UTF-8 文本内容映射，目标只能是 backend/data/skills/user/<skill_key>。如果测试失败，读取 validation_errors、smoke_test、stdout、stderr 和 errors，修改 generated_skill_files 后再次调用。

inputSchema.name: Action
inputSchema.description: One of inspect_existing_skills, validate_skill_package, write_skill_package, apply_skill_patch, run_skill_smoke_test, rollback_skill_revision, or get_skill_revision.

inputSchema.name: Skill Key
inputSchema.description: Target user Skill key. Required for every action except inspect_existing_skills.

inputSchema.name: Files
inputSchema.description: Relative package path to UTF-8 text content mapping, for example {"skill.json":"...","SKILL.md":"...","run.py":"..."}.

inputSchema.name: Smoke Input
inputSchema.description: Example JSON object passed to run.py during smoke testing.

inputSchema.name: Revision ID
inputSchema.description: Revision identifier for rollback_skill_revision or get_skill_revision.

outputSchema.name: Changed Paths
outputSchema.description: Files changed by write, patch, or rollback.

outputSchema.name: Revision ID
outputSchema.description: Previous package revision created before mutation.

outputSchema.name: Test Status
outputSchema.description: succeeded or failed for the latest validation/smoke stage.

outputSchema.name: Skill Catalog
outputSchema.description: Existing official and user Skill summaries.

outputSchema.name: Builder Result
outputSchema.description: Complete structured result for downstream repair agents.
